General.Name: Royal Catering Group Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: Jin Mi Fang Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides casual dining food catering services in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. It operates through Catering and Related Business; Trading of Luxury Watches Business; Money Lending Business; and Sales and Distribution of Food and Wine Business segments. The company operates restaurants under the Du Hsiao Yueh Restaurant and Wo Shun Kee brands. It is also involved in trading of luxury watches; holding of franchise; provision of money lending and human resources management services; supply of wine; and distribution of food. The company was formerly known as Royal Group Holdings International Company Limited and changed its name to Jin Mi Fang Group Holdings Limited in January 2024. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Tai Kok Tsui, Hong Kong. Jin Mi Fang Group Holdings Limited operates as a subsidiary of Sky Shield Investment Limited.
General.Address: Evernew Commercial Centre, Tai Kok Tsui, Hong Kong
